observation: generated cache directories under workspace with approved cache names and containment checked
exact duplicate group exists, but canonical owner still unconfirmed
falsifiers: hash refresh confirms all duplicates unchanged

observation: short hash matched but full SHA256 was transcribed incorrectly in ficha
falsifiers: full hash corrected and revalidated against source files
post_validation: corrected hash matches source and selector

observation: PSI redundant vault file has same SHA256 as canonical archive copy and no exact active references to redundant path
decision: delete exact duplicate and keep canonical
post_validation: delete path absent; canonical path present; secret scan 0; WitnessLog hash-chain valid

observation: PSI redundant vault residual file has no exact canonical match outside vault
decision: keep file untouched and create residual review ficha
post_validation: residual file remains with hash and REVIEW state

observation: another agent owns language or local-agent implementation lane
falsifiers: owner path is no longer active
post_validation: no concurrent files staged or edited

observation: action touches secrets, private RPG/TCG, publication, external push, medical/physical/social claim, or browser/auth state
falsifiers: none without explicit new gate and evidence
decision: do not act; create blocked record
post_validation: no external or private action executed
residue: requires human or separate boundary protocol
